extension.summary: Transfer Stream Cinema login tokens between Kodi installations
Prenos prihlasovacich tokenov Stream Cinema medzi Kodi instalaciami
Prenos prihlasovacich tokenu Stream Cinema mezi instalacemi Kodi
extension.description: Exports, imports, or manually applies Stream Cinema credential settings without bundling any secret values in the add-on package.
Exportuje, importuje alebo rucne zapisuje prihlasovacie nastavenia Stream Cinema bez ulozenia tajnych hodnot v baliku doplnku.
Exportuje, importuje nebo rucne zapisuje prihlasovaci nastaveni Stream Cinema bez ulozeni tajnych hodnot v baliku doplnku.
